ALERT COLOUR CODE: ORANGE.

EXPLOSIVE-EXTRUSIVE ERUPTION OF VOLCANO INPR.

RISK OF ASH ERUPTION UP TO 12 KM ABOVE SEA LEVEL REMAINS.

CONTINUING VOLCANO ERUPRTION CAN BE HAZARDOUS FOR DOM AND INTL FLT.

MENTIONED AREA.
